occupation: Chief Executive Officer at ALMA - Advertising Company
headline: Chief Executive Officer at ALMA
summary:
After six years of working in JSC Bank of Georgia in the field of commercial banking I have got professional experience in different industries: Corporate finance, financial accounting, financial modeling, valuation, budgeting and reporting.

But today, as Chief Executive Officer of Alma Ltd, looking back I see the big importance of management and leadership. I see the value of team building, motivation and corporate culture - terms which were vague for me years before.

With superior interpersonal and communication skills I strive for implementing effective ways of employee motivation, employee engagement, positive employee morale, rewards and recognition.

experiences.title: Chief Executive Officer
experiences.description: •	Determining the company’s strategic objectives and policies; •	Responsible for driving the growth of revenue and profit margins; •	Responsible for all contracts and lease agreements with key stakeholders & clients; •	Interpreting financial data and drawing conclusions; •	Implementing systems that reward good staff performance & competence; •	Motivating & providing strong leadership to all departments; •	Monitoring progress towards achieving the objectives and policies; •	Accounting for the company’s activities to shareholders;

experiences.title: Chief Executive Officer
experiences.description: Generating new development deals for a company that focuses on multi-projects, including commercial and residential real estate development through Georgia.

experiences.title: Principal Corporate Banker
experiences.description: - Managing existing portfolio of 40 VIP clients out of top 100 clients of Bank of Georgia defined for the VIP Banking Unit; - Negotiations with potential clients, preparing presentations for these meetings; - Analyzing strategic plans, financial statements and ratios of the companies to be financed; - Identifying opportunities for existing and potential clients and apprising investment proposals in terms of financing and documentary operations; - Selling the Bank Products to Corporate Clients and their employees.

experiences.title: Corporate Sales Manager
experiences.description: -  Managing portfolio of Legal Entities; -  Making intensive phone calls to clients in order to arrange meetings and make presentations about various banking products; -  Preparing reports and databases of clients; -  Participating in the negotiations with new clients; -  Understanding clients’ requirements and making transfers to appropriate Departments.

recommendations:
Givi Chachia

Giorgi was our corporate banker; we were working on various projects during 4 years. During our cooperation, Giorgi has shown up himself as reliable and productive partner, with high level of competence in almost all fields of banking business.

Nikoloz Doborjginidze

Giorgi  is a personable individual that gets on well with those around him. He is focused and dedicated to producing his very best at all times. He has shown that he is able to deal with uncertainty and dislocation and I recommend him highly – he has a great sense of responsibility and truly client oriented approach. I'm happy to have a chance to work with him.
